debug_info.goal:
case succ
α : Type
inst✝² : DecidableEq α
inst✝¹ : SampleableType α
inst✝ : OracleSpec.DecidableEq (MerkleTree.spec α)
n : ℕ
ih :
  ∀ (leaves : List.Vector α (2 ^ n)) (preexisting_cache : QueryCache (MerkleTree.spec α)),
    HasEvalSPMF.NeverFail
      (((fun {α_1} x => (simulateQ randomOracle).toFun α_1 x) (MerkleTree.buildMerkleTree α n leaves)).run
        preexisting_cache)
leaves : List.Vector α (2 ^ (n + 1))
preexisting_cache : QueryCache (MerkleTree.spec α)
⊢ HasEvalSPMF.NeverFail
    (((fun {α_1} x => (simulateQ randomOracle).toFun α_1 x) (MerkleTree.buildMerkleTree α (n + 1) leaves)).run
      preexisting_cache)

failed_attempts:
simp [buildMerkleTree, neverFails_bind_iff]
    <;> induction n <;> simp_all [buildMerkleTree, neverFails_bind_iff, pow_succ]
    <;> try simp_all [buildMerkleTree, neverFails_bind_iff, pow_succ]
    <;> try aesop
    <;> try
      (try
        simp_all [buildMerkleTree, neverFails_bind_iff, pow_succ]
        <;> aesop)

simp [buildMerkleTree, buildLayer]
    <;> simp_all [neverFails_bind_iff, HasEvalSPMF.get]
    <;> (try decide)
    <;> (try tauto)
    <;> (try simp_all [List.Vector.nth])
    <;> (try simp_all [List.Vector.length])
    <;> (try simp_all [Fin.val_succ])
    <;> (try simp_all [Fin.val_zero])
    <;> (try simp_all [pow_succ])
    <;> (try simp_all [Fin.sum_univ_succ])
    <;> (try simp_all [Fin.sum_univ_zero])
    <;> (try simp_all [Fin.last_val])
    <;> (try simp_all [Fin.succAbove_injective])
    <;> (try simp_all [Fin.succAbove_descending])
    <;> (try simp_all [Fin.succAbove_min_lt])
    <;> (try simp_all [Fin.succAbove_lt_iff])
    <;> simp_all [List.Vector.nth]

trivial.
    simp [buildMerkleTree]
    <;> simp_all [HasEvalSPMF.neverFail]
  | succ n ih =>
    -- Inductive step: Assume the statement holds for `n`, prove for `n + 1`.
    simp [buildMerkleTree]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [HasEvalSPMF.neverFail]) <;>
    (try
      {
        -- Use the fact that each recursive call never fails.
        apply HasEvalSPMF.neverFail_of_forall
        intro next_leaves
        have h₁ : HasEvalSPMF.NeverFail ((simulateQ randomOracle fun x => buildMerkleTree α n x).run next_leaves) := by
          apply ih
        -- Use the fact that the build of the next layer never fails.
        apply HasEvalSPMF.neverFail_of_forall
        intro next_cache
        <;>
        (try simp_all [HasEvalSPMF.neverFail]) <;>
        (try
          {
            -- Use the neverFails property of each component.
            simp_all [HasEvalSPMF.neverFail]
            <;>
            aesop
          })
      })<;>
    (try
      {
        -- Handle the base case and build the tree step by step.
        simp_all [HasEvalSPMF.neverFail]
        <;>
        aesop
      })<;>
    (try
      {
        -- Use the fact that the build of the next layer never fails.
        apply HasEvalSPMF.neverFail_of_forall
        intro x
        <;>
        (try simp_all [HasEvalSPMF.neverFail]) <;>
        (try
          {
            -- Use the neverFails property of each component.
            simp_all [HasEvalSPMF.neverFail]
            <;>
            aesop
          })
      })

simp_all [buildMerkleTree, buildLayer]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [List.Vector.get?, List.Vector.ofFn, List.Vector.mmap])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ, Nat.div_eq_of_lt])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [List.Vector.get?, List.Vector.ofFn, List.Vector.mmap, Fin.ext_iff, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ, Nat.div_eq_of_lt])
    <;>
    (try aesop)
    <;>
    (try simp_all [HasEvalSPMF.NeverFail, SPMF.deterministic])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [List.Vector.get?, List.Vector.ofFn, List.Vector.mmap, Fin.ext_iff, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ, Nat.div_eq_of_lt])
    <;>
    (try aesop)
    <;>
    (try simp_all [HasEvalSPMF.NeverFail, SPMF.deterministic, List.Vector.get?, List.Vector.ofFn, List.Vector.mmap, Fin.ext_iff, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ, Nat.div_eq_of_lt])
    <;>
    (try aesop)
    <;>
    (try simp_all [List.Vector.get?, List.Vector.ofFn, List.Vector.mmap, Fin.ext_iff, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ, Nat.div_eq_of_lt])
    <;>
    (try aesop)

simp_all [buildMerkleTree, buildLayer, neverFails_bind_iff]
    <;>
    (try decide) <;>
    (try
      {
        intros caches
        <;>
        (try norm_num) <;>
        (try aesop)
      }) <;>
    (try
      {
        intros <;>
        simp_all [List.Vector.get] <;>
        (try norm_num) <;>
        (try aesop)
      })

simp [buildMerkleTree, buildLayer, List.Vector.mmap, List.Vector.ofFn, List.Vector.get]
    <;>
    simp_all [HasEvalSPMF.NeverFail, evalSPMF]
    <;>
    try
      aesop
    <;>
    try
      simp_all [HasEvalSPMF.NeverFail, evalSPMF]
    <;>
    try
      aesop
    <;>
    try
      simp_all [HasEvalSPMF.NeverFail, evalSPMF]
    <;>
    try
      aesop
